endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.MixedReality/operations
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MixedReality/locations/{location}/checkNameAvailability
endpoints.description: Check Name Availability for global uniqueness
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.MixedReality/spatialAnchorsAccounts
endpoints.description: List Spatial Anchors Accounts by Subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MixedReality/spatialAnchorsAccounts
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MixedReality/spatialAnchorsAccounts/{spatialAnchorsAccountName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SPATIALANCHORSACCOUNTNAME}} with a real spatialanchorsaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MixedReality/spatialAnchorsAccounts/{spatialAnchorsAccountName}
endpoints.description: Creating or Updating a Spatial Anchors Account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SPATIALANCHORSACCOUNTNAME}} with a real spatialanchorsaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MixedReality/spatialAnchorsAccounts/{spatialAnchorsAccountName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SPATIALANCHORSACCOUNTNAME}} with a real spatialanchorsaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MixedReality/spatialAnchorsAccounts/{spatialAnchorsAccountName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SPATIALANCHORSACCOUNTNAME}} with a real spatialanchorsaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MixedReality/spatialAnchorsAccounts/{spatialAnchorsAccountName}/keys
endpoints.description: Get Both of the 2 Keys of a Spatial Anchors Account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SPATIALANCHORSACCOUNTNAME}} with a real spatialanchorsaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.MixedReality/spatialAnchorsAccounts/{spatialAnchorsAccountName}/keys
endpoints.description: Regenerate 1 Key of a Spatial Anchors Account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SPATIALANCHORSACCOUNTNAME}} with a real spatialanchorsaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
